who: field service billing clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For field service billing clerks processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late invoicing. We automate the conversion of job sheets into invoicing data instead of manual entry into accounting software.
problem: manual data entry from job sheets to invoices
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing clerks
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to billing clerks with demo video
Community forums for billing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and invoice preview
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
